shared_attributes.design_principle: maximum clarity at minimum size, non-intrusive

context.role: displays Echo's needs via icon (seed when hungry), appears above Echo
context.screen_position: upper right of Echo (x=80, y=40) when visible
context.usage_scenario: appears when Echo is in hungry state, shows seed icon to communicate need for food, disappears when fed

visual_specification.shape: rounded rectangle speech bubble with small tail pointing toward Echo

animation.description: static bubble with icon inside, appears/disappears instantly based on Echo's state

visual_specification.details: cream background (#FFF1E8) with 1px navy outline (#1D2B53), contains seed icon (3x3px #FFA300) centered inside, small tail (2px) points toward Echo's head, appears only during hungry state

relationships.shared_with: seed icon matches actual seed object color and shape
relationships.differences_from: contextual UI element (appears only in specific state), communicates Echo's needs unlike passive UI elements

explicit_negations: no multiple icons (one at a time)
no gradient or shading on bubble
no other states beyond hungry (sleep uses ZZZ particle instead)
